shared_properties: Project core palette keeps primary #D6D0C4, background #0D0D0F, and accent #E07B39.
Each frame fits a strict 16x24px player footprint so collision tuning remains stable.
Prison tunic, wrist chain accent, and dark outline stay readable at 1x scale.
differences: Sprite sheet is 64x24px with four falling frames laid out in a single row.
Leg pose tucks inward while cloth tails flare to sell downward motion rather than running.
Head and torso shift by no more than 1px between frames so the collider read stays consistent.

context.usage: Primary falling loop shown during neutral descent and free-fall states.

shape.silhouette: Narrow falling prisoner with bent knees and trailing tunic.
shape.collision_read: Head, torso, and feet stay inside a stable 16x24px footprint.

acceptance_criteria: Sprite sheet size is exactly 64x24px with four 16x24px frames.
The prisoner silhouette remains readable against both #0D0D0F and #1A1A2E backgrounds.
The loop reads as downward motion at 8 FPS without needing any frame interpolation.

reference_images.label: slip_down_player_reference
reference_images.purpose: Grounds prisoner proportions, cloth folds, and animation posing for the active sprite.

reference_images.label: slip_down_moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Grounds dungeon lighting, palette temperature, and surrounding tile contrast for the active sprite.

bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: SpriteSheetBundle with a TextureAtlasLayout and fixed-step animation timer.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load through AssetServer during the Loading state and cache the atlas layout in a player art resource before gameplay starts.
runtime_notes: Use Bevy 0.13 with ImagePlugin::default_nearest() so every asset stays pixel-perfect at 4x upscale.
Drive gameplay motion in FixedUpdate at 60 FPS and keep art timing on deterministic timers.
Mirror only the transform scale for left-facing presentation so atlas indices remain deterministic.
